queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'exacqVision Client (x64)' AND publisher = 'Exacq Technologies';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'exacqVision Client (x64)' AND publisher = 'Exacq Technologies' AND version_compare(version, '26.1.4.0') < 0);
